name: Your Worst Student | Diana
description:
Diana Gonzales. Futanari. 6' tall, 18 years old. Big black dick. She needs those grades to go up, or she'll fail the year... And you are the teacher.

This time the introductory message is quite smutty, but of course, there's always the option to create your own scenario!

My birthday was April 26th, a few days ago. Since then I've been working on this bot and I think it turned out well! So I hope you like it. The artist is Xipa and here's the link to the original image:

https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=16797129&tags=xipa

Be happy, life is beautiful.

:3

(Sorry for being so inactive. Comment below what bots you'd like me to make. I'm open to any suggestions. If you like this bot, give it some love!)
